title: The Deep Current Listening Chamber

features.name: temporal-rupture reading
features.desc-on-touch: The chamber registers simultaneous moments as sequential lines. Here, all versions of the surgery occur at once, but the listening-post can only report them one after another, inventing sequence from simultaneity.

features.name: sensory-estrangement monitor
features.desc-on-touch: This installation holds the Seoul experiments—binaural audio synchronized to your movement through the archive, fragmenting your sense of where sound originates. You cannot tell if the current is moving you or you are moving through the current.

features.name: animated-moment captured
features.desc-on-touch: The Taiwanese short films treated the narrative as motion-study, frame by frame. This archive-node holds the compressed middle: the frame before motion, the frame after, and the exact moment the archive stopped knowing which came first.

features.name: current-vector diagram
features.desc-on-touch: The tributaries flow into this listening chamber and forget their origin. The diagram shows all nine versions of this moment as vectors pointing toward and away from the same point simultaneously.

features.name: version-synchronizer
features.desc-on-touch: Designed to hold all known adaptations as one coherent signal. It fails regularly—the versions rupture, interrupt each other, create harmonics that do not exist in any source material.

inscription: where all the versions of one moment learn to listen to each other across time and translation, creating a sound that has no original source

file.name: East_Asian_Cinema_Temporal_Rupture_Index.txt
file.note: status: germinating — the archive is still learning how to hold narratives that treat simultaneity as a primary event rather than an error condition

exits.label: back to the unified current where the tributaries still remember their separate origins
toward the deeper chamber where the current stops distinguishing between past and future
exits.to: NEW: the chamber where current becomes memory becomes future current

exits.label: toward the estuary where the different versions begin to separate back into salt water
